title: Sample_857_ILC1_Mtb
extract_protocol_ch1: Cells sorted into RLT buffer and RNA extracted with Qiagen micro RNA kit.
extract_protocol_ch1.1: cDNA generation and amplification with SMartSeq v4 kit. Sequence libraries prepared with Nextera XT kit.
description: group 1 ILC from Mtb infected lung tissue
data_processing: Sequence reads were trimmed for adaptor sequence and mapped to hg19 human genome using STAR v2.5.3a
data_processing.1: Read counts were calculated using htseq-count.
data_processing.2: Expression analysis performed with edgeR v3.12.1
data_processing.4: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: processed data files include raw counts of uniquely mapped sequence reads with ensemble transcript ID per sample.
